title: Rubrik Object Context Analysis - Rubrik Polaris
content:
This playbook will investigate based on the object type from the Rubrik Anomaly incident to retrieve the policy hits of the files related to the object.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Rubrik pack (RubrikPolaris, partner-supported).

Inputs — object_id: The Object ID or the Snappable ID. Default can be received from incident if present.; object_type: The Object type. Default can be received from incident if present..

      id: a86dbba9-493d-46bb-87ff-067a5bfcb1e6

      description: Checks whether the object type contains fileset, volume group or the VM.
      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:

      "Yes":

            iscontext: true
          right:
            value:
              simple: Fileset
          ignorecase: true
        - operator: containsGeneral

              complex:
                root: inputs.object_type
                transformers:

            iscontext: true
          right:

              simple: Vm
        - operator: containsGeneral

            value:
              complex:

            iscontext: true
          right:
            value:
              simple: VolumeGroup
